blended.narrative: Crystal Mountain Michigan is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,809 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 56°F.

Friday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
